rulings.Case Title: ** TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA ** GUARDIANSHIP OF KATYA PALIE COHEN TALLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: FILING OF INVENTORY
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. declarations were filed re the minor's interest in a testamentary trust set up in her mother's estate, but neither declaration discussed whether the minor's interests are properly inventoried with respect to those trust assets (for example, it is not clear whether all assets in the mother's estate will be distributed to the trust or only the real property, but either way, the inventory must be amended to include that testamentary trust - see CEB CA guardianship practice section 9.57).
